history.en: The favourite perch of the Devon Rex is right at head level, on the shoulder of her favorite person. She takes a lively interest in everything that is going on and refuses to be left out of any activity. Count on her to stay as close to you as possible, occasionally communicating his opinions in a quiet voice. She loves people and welcomes the attentions of friends and family alike.
history.zh: 德文卷毛猫最喜欢的栖息位置就在头部高度，即它最爱的人的肩膀上。它对周围发生的一切都充满兴趣，拒绝被排除在任何活动之外。可以指望它尽可能贴近你，偶尔用轻柔的声音表达自己的意见。它热爱人类，同样欢迎朋友和家人的关注。

overview.en: The Devon Rex is a highly interactive, mischievous, and loyal breed that thrives on human companionship. Known for its distinctive wavy coat, large bat-like ears, and elfin face, this cat is a bundle of energy and affection. Devon Rex cats are intensely social and will follow their owners from room to room, often perching on shoulders to stay involved in every activity. They are playful and clever, enjoying games that challenge their intelligence. Despite their active nature, they also love to cuddle and seek warmth, often burrowing under blankets. Their quiet, melodic voice adds to their charm, and they greet friends and family with enthusiasm. This breed is ideal for owners who want an interactive, devoted pet that brings constant joy and entertainment.
overview.zh: 德文雷克斯猫是一种高度互动、顽皮且忠诚的品种，极度依赖人类的陪伴。以其独特的波浪状被毛、大蝙蝠耳和精灵般的面孔而闻名，这种猫充满活力且感情丰富。德文雷克斯猫极为社交，会跟随主人从一个房间到另一个房间，常常栖息在肩膀上以参与所有活动。它们活泼聪明，喜欢挑战智力的游戏。尽管天性活跃，它们也热爱依偎并寻求温暖，经常钻到毯子下。它们安静悦耳的叫声增添了魅力，并热情地迎接朋友和家人。这个品种非常适合希望拥有一个互动、忠诚宠物、能带来持续欢乐和娱乐的主人。

care.en: Daily care for a Devon Rex is relatively low-maintenance but requires attention to specific needs. Their short, fine coat needs minimal grooming; a weekly wipe with a damp cloth or gentle pet wipe is sufficient to remove oils, as their coat lacks protective guard hairs and can become greasy. Bathe every few weeks if needed with a mild cat shampoo. Clean their large ears weekly with a vet-approved solution to prevent wax buildup. Trim nails every two weeks. Exercise needs are high—provide at least 30 minutes of interactive play daily using wand toys, puzzle feeders, or fetch games. They benefit from cat trees or shelves for climbing. Annual vet visits are essential, plus dental check-ups and vaccinations. Due to their thin coat, keep them indoors in cool climates and provide warm bedding.
care.zh: 德文雷克斯猫的日常护理相对简单，但需要关注特定需求。它们短而细腻的被毛需要最少的梳理：每周用湿布或温和的宠物湿巾擦拭一次即可去除油脂，因为它们的被毛缺乏防护性刚毛，容易变油。如有必要，每隔几周用温和的猫咪洗发水洗澡。每周用兽医认可的溶液清洁它们的大耳朵以防耳垢堆积。每两周修剪指甲。运动需求高——每天至少提供30分钟互动游戏，使用逗猫棒、益智喂食器或接球游戏。它们喜欢猫爬架或搁板来攀爬。每年必须进行兽医检查，以及牙齿检查和疫苗接种。由于被毛薄，在寒冷气候下应让它们待在室内，并提供温暖的床铺。

training.en: Devon Rex cats are highly intelligent and eager to please, making them one of the easiest breeds to train. Use positive reinforcement methods such as treats, praise, and clicker training. They can learn tricks like sit, high-five, fetch, and even walking on a harness. Start training early, keeping sessions short (5–10 minutes) and fun to match their playful nature. They respond well to puzzle toys and interactive challenges that stimulate their mind. Because they are social, involve them in family activities and reward calm behavior. Avoid harsh corrections, as they are sensitive and may become withdrawn. Consistency is key; practice daily to reinforce commands. Their mischievous side means they may test boundaries, so use redirection rather than punishment. With patience, they excel in obedience and agility.
training.zh: 德文雷克斯猫非常聪明且渴望取悦主人，是最容易训练的猫种之一。使用积极强化方法，如零食、表扬和响片训练。它们能学会坐下、击掌、捡回等技巧，甚至能适应穿戴胸背带散步。尽早开始训练，保持每次5–10分钟的短时、有趣课程，以匹配它们爱玩的性格。它们对益智玩具和互动挑战反应良好，这些能刺激大脑。由于它们善于社交，让它们参与家庭活动，并奖励冷静行为。避免严厉纠正，因为它们敏感，可能会变得退缩。一致性至关重要；每天练习以巩固指令。它们顽皮的一面意味着可能会试探界限，因此使用转移注意力的方法而非惩罚。只要有耐心，它们在服从性和敏捷性方面都能表现出色。

diet.en: The Devon Rex has a fast metabolism and high energy level, requiring a nutrient-dense diet to maintain its lean body and active lifestyle. Feed high-quality commercial cat food—wet or dry—with real meat as the first ingredient, ensuring it meets AAFCO standards. Protein should be around 30–40% of their diet, with moderate fat (15–20%) for energy. Avoid fillers like corn and soy. Divide meals into two to three portions daily to prevent overeating and support metabolism. Provide fresh water at all times; consider a cat fountain to encourage hydration. Because they are prone to dental issues, include some dental treats or raw chicken necks (under supervision) for teeth cleaning. Monitor weight closely, as some Devon Rexes can become overweight if overfed. Consult your vet for portion sizes, especially for kittens and seniors.
diet.zh: 德文雷克斯猫新陈代谢快、能量水平高，需要营养密集的饮食来维持苗条体型和活跃生活方式。喂食高质量的商业猫粮——湿粮或干粮——以真实肉类为首要成分，确保符合AAFCO标准。蛋白质应占饮食的30–40%，中等脂肪（15–20%）提供能量。避免玉米和大豆等填充物。将每日餐食分成两到三份，以防止暴食并支持新陈代谢。始终提供新鲜饮用水；考虑使用猫喷泉以鼓励饮水。由于它们易患牙齿问题，可包含一些洁齿零食或生鸡脖（在监督下）用于清洁牙齿。密切监测体重，因为部分德文雷克斯猫若喂食过量可能超重。咨询兽医确定份量，尤其是幼猫和老年猫。

livingTips.en: The Devon Rex is ideally suited for apartment living due to its small to medium size and indoor preference, but it needs plenty of vertical space and interactive toys to stay stimulated. They are not suited for outdoor free-roaming due to their thin coat and social nature—they are best kept strictly indoors or in a secure catio. They adapt well to homes with children, as they are patient and playful, but supervise young kids to ensure gentle handling. They get along wonderfully with other cats and cat-friendly dogs, often becoming the ringleader of the group. Provide warm spots like heated beds, blankets, or sunny windowsills, as they seek heat. They dislike being left alone for long hours; consider a companion pet if you work full-time. Overall, they thrive in an attentive, loving environment where they are part of all family activities.
livingTips.zh: 德文雷克斯猫因其中小体型和室内偏好，非常适合公寓生活，但需要大量垂直空间和互动玩具来保持刺激。由于被毛薄且性格爱社交，它们不适合户外自由活动——最好严格室内饲养或安置在安全的猫笼中。它们能很好地适应有孩子的家庭，因为耐心且爱玩，但需监督幼童确保轻柔对待。它们与其他猫和友善的狗相处融洽，常成为群体中的领头者。提供温暖的地方，如加热床、毯子或阳光窗台，因为它们喜欢温暖。它们不喜欢长时间独处；如果你全职工作，考虑养一只伴侣宠物。总之，它们在一个充满关爱、关注的环境中茁壮成长，并参与所有家庭活动。
